name: Grévy's Zebra Tee
description: The Grévy's Zebra is the largest wild equid and one of the most endangered zebra species. Your purchase contributes directly to their conservation.
impact: A portion of every sale supports Grévy's Zebra conservation in Kenya.

name: Amur Leopard Tee
description: With fewer than 100 individuals left in the wild, the Amur Leopard is the world's rarest big cat. Wear their story.
impact: Every purchase contributes to Amur Leopard habitat protection in Russia's Far East.

name: Sumatran Orangutan Tee
description: Critically endangered due to deforestation and illegal wildlife trade, the Sumatran Orangutan needs our voices.
impact: Sales support rainforest conservation efforts in Sumatra, Indonesia.

name: Black Rhino Tee
description: Critically endangered and heavily poached for their horns, Black Rhinos need every advocate they can get.
impact: A percentage of every sale funds anti-poaching patrols across Southern Africa.

name: Snow Leopard Tee
description: Elusive and majestic, Snow Leopards roam the high mountains of Central Asia — and they're running out of space.
impact: Purchases contribute to Snow Leopard habitat and prey conservation in the Himalayas.

name: Bengal Tiger Tee
description: India's national animal, the Bengal Tiger is endangered with fewer than 3,000 remaining in the wild. Represent the stripes.
impact: Every sale supports tiger corridor conservation across India.
